title: Craftable Coral Block
description: craft recipe: 3x3 coral/coral fan -> coral block.
body:
Make coral blocks renewable. ## Coral Tags 5x2 tags added: `brain|bubble|fire|horn|tube` 5 types, `live|dead` 2 variants. - Tags `#corals:brain_corals` <- Item `minecraft:brain_coral` - Tags `#corals:brain_corals` <- Item `minecraft:brain_coral_fan` ## Coral Block Recipes 5x2 Recipes: 3x3 -> 1 coral block. - 3x3 Item `brain_coral|brain_coral_fan` -> 1 Item `brain_coral_block`

## Credits This project is a fix to [https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-corals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-corals), since its `1.21-1.21.1` is not working.
